validation.slug: Lowercase letters, digits, hyphens; no leading/trailing -

messages.checkEmail: Check your email to verify your account, then log in.
messages.verifyMissingParams: Verification link missing required parameters. Try signing up again.

login.title: Log in
login.tagline: Your voice. Every platform. On schedule.
login.headline: Welcome back.
login.lede: One brand, every feed — pick up where you left off.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.legal: By signing up you agree to our <terms>Terms</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
signup.headline: Start your trial.
signup.lede: Connect your platforms in minutes. Nothing publishes without your approval.

pane.headline: Six platforms. One voice.
pane.lede: Write once. Sepio adapts each post to the feed it lands in, and never publishes without your approval.

forgot.headline: Forgot your password?
forgot.lede: Enter the email you signed up with. We will send a one-time link to set a new password.
forgot.sentBody: If a Sepio account exists for that email, a reset link is on its way. It expires in 60 minutes.

reset.headline: Set a new password.
reset.lede: Choose something memorable. Once it is set you will be signed in on this device.
reset.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

dashboard.title: Your brands
dashboard.brandCount: {count, plural, =0 {no brands} one {# brand} other {# brands}}

empty.title: No brands yet.
empty.body: The brand wizard collects voice, tone, customer language and SEO topics. Takes about 3 minutes.

toast.connectedBody: You can now publish posts to your LinkedIn from this brand.
toast.errorFallback: Try again. If it keeps happening — check the logs.

linkedin.notConnected: Not connected. Connect your personal LinkedIn to publish posts.

marketBrain.subtitle: Competitor differentiation that grounds generation. Updated weekly, or recompute on demand.
marketBrain.differentiationEmpty: No differentiation computed yet. Add at least two competitors, then recompute.
marketBrain.empty: No competitors yet. Add the sites you compete with.
marketBrain.recomputeQueued: Recomputing — refresh in a minute to see results.

error.notSignedIn: You're signed out. Refresh and try again.
error.noBetaAccess: Market Brain isn't enabled for this account yet.

brandSettings.title: {brand} settings
brandSettings.subtitle: Industry · language · accounts
brandSettings.industryDescription: Pick the category that best describes this brand. Used to ground topic research and tone defaults.
brandSettings.languageDescription: Default language new posts will be generated in. You can override per-post in the writer.
brandSettings.voiceDescription: Free-text guidance on how this brand sounds — tone, perspective, words to use or avoid. Fed straight into every generation prompt.
brandSettings.voicePlaceholder: e.g. Direct, no fluff. Talks to facilities managers, not consumers. Uses metric units. Never refers to clients as 'customers' — they're 'operators'.

industryPicker.searchPlaceholder: Type to search (e.g. hvac, bakery, marketing)
industryPicker.typeToSearch: Start typing to find your category
industryPicker.clickOtherShort: Not the right one? Suggest a category
industryPicker.waitlistDescription: Describe what your brand does. We review suggestions weekly and add categories that come up often.
industryPicker.waitlistTextPlaceholder: e.g. Vape shop, Crystal healing studio, Drone aerial photography…
industryPicker.waitlistEmailPlaceholder: Email (optional, so we can notify you)

hero.h1: Your voice. Every platform. On schedule.
hero.tagline: One idea, every platform, in your voice.
hero.body: Sepio turns one idea into platform-fit posts in your brand voice — LinkedIn long-form, Twitter threads, blog posts — and ships them on the schedule you set. Pennies per post.

problem.h2: Content dies the day operations get loud.
problem.body: Service-business founders pick operations over content every Monday. The blank page always loses. We hit this at our own HVAC business in Panama, then built the engine: one source idea → platform-fit drafts → scheduled publish. Sepio is that engine.

how.h2: Three steps from idea to published post.

step1.title: Capture your voice
step1.body: A short wizard pulls tone, audience, and vocabulary from your existing writing. Five minutes, once.

step2.title: Generate per platform
step2.body: One topic, one click. Get a LinkedIn long-form, a Twitter thread, a blog post — all in your voice, each formatted for its platform.

step3.title: Schedule and ship
step3.body: Set a cadence. Connect your accounts. We post when you said, where you said.

finalCta.body: Free during pre-alpha. No card required.

writer.topicPlaceholder: Topic hint for {brand} — or leave blank.
writer.articlePlaceholder: Paste the full article (blog post, newsletter, long email…) and we'll adapt one idea into a LinkedIn post.
writer.articleTooShort: Article is too short to adapt — at least 50 characters.
writer.rehumanizeTooltip: Rewrite the text so it reads less like AI
writer.undoTooltip: Restore the text before the last humanize

topicPicker.title: Today's topics
topicPicker.helper: Pick one — or leave unselected to write your own.
topicPicker.empty: No topics yet. We're researching — check back in ~10 minutes.
topicPicker.errorFallback: Couldn't load topics. Refresh to retry.

writer.emptyBody: Give Sepio a topic or paste an article in the panel on the left. It drafts the post in your brand voice — you edit, then publish.
writer.previewEmpty: Write something — and watch it appear here, shaped for the feed.

posts.title: Your posts
posts.subtitle: {count, plural, =0 {no posts yet} one {# post} other {# posts}}
posts.bulkDeleteConfirm: Delete {count} posts? This cannot be undone.

empty.title: No posts yet.
empty.body: Generate your first post in the Writer and it will appear here.

detail.deleteConfirm: Delete this post? This cannot be undone.

shell.title: Add a brand
shell.intro: One brand = one set of voice rules, customer language, SEO topics, and connected social accounts. You can add more brands later.

basics.label: Brand basics
basics.nameDescription: The display name shown in your dashboard. Can be anything — your company, a product line, a personal channel.
basics.slugDescription: A short identifier used in URLs. Auto-generated from the brand name — letters, digits, hyphens. You can edit it, but it's awkward to change later, so keep it short.
basics.websiteDescription: Optional. Bare domain works — e.g. 24clima.com. We'll add https:// for you.
basics.industryDescription: Pick the category that best fits — type to search. Used to ground the AI when it writes about adjacent topics. Optional.
basics.languageDescription: The main language posts will be generated in. You can change it per-post later.
basics.descriptionDescription: Who is this brand for and what does it sell? One sentence is plenty — the AI uses this to stay on-topic.
basics.descriptionPlaceholder: B2B HVAC distributor in Panama, focused on commercial installers.

voice.label: Brand voice
voice.toneDescription: Short adjectives that describe how the brand sounds. Enter or comma to add. Examples: professional, warm, no-nonsense, witty. Max 8 — fewer is usually better.
voice.voiceDescription: How would you describe the voice if you had to explain it to a new hire in one breath? Skip if the articles below say it for you.
voice.voicePlaceholder: Like a senior engineer talking to peers — direct, technical, zero fluff.
voice.articlesDescription: Paste up to {maxArticles} pieces of real writing that already sound like this brand — a blog post, LinkedIn essay, newsletter, even a long sales email. The AI will mirror this style when generating new posts. Up to {maxWords} words per article — anything longer is trimmed automatically. The more you give us, the better — but the first article is the most important.
voice.articlePlaceholder: Paste the full text of one article here…
voice.noArticlesHint: No articles yet. Skipping is OK — generation will fall back to tone attributes alone, but quality will be lower.

wordGuards.label: Word guards
wordGuards.forbiddenDescription: Words and phrases the AI must never use. Best place to drop corporate clichés you hate («leverage», «synergy», «unlock»). Enter or comma to add. Up to 50.
wordGuards.forbiddenPlaceholder: leverage, elevate, in today's fast-paced world
wordGuards.requiredDescription: Branded terms or pet phrases the AI should weave in when natural — product names, taglines, your usual signoff. Optional. Up to 20.

voc.label: Customer voice
voc.painBody: Real things customers say when something hurts. Paste verbatim from support tickets, calls, reviews, DMs — any source. The AI mirrors this language so the post sounds like it's coming from someone who's actually talked to a customer. Up to 10 quotes.
voc.painPlaceholder: “My old AC keeps breaking every summer.”
voc.outcomesBody: What customers say they want — in their words, not yours. The flip side of pain points. Up to 10 quotes.
voc.outcomesPlaceholder: “I want it to just work for 10 years.”
voc.triggersDescription: Specific moments that push someone to look for this brand. Used when generating timely content. Optional, up to 10.
voc.triggersPlaceholder: new office build-out, AC breakdown in summer

seo.label: SEO keywords (optional)
seo.optionalBody: In a future version we'll auto-research keywords for you via DataForSEO — you'll see traffic, difficulty, and trend curves and pick from a recommended list. For now: leave both fields empty and we'll generate based on your description, or add a few manually if you already know them.
seo.primaryDescription: The 3-8 topics this brand most wants to be found for. Up to 15. Enter or comma to add.
seo.primaryPlaceholder: commercial HVAC Panama, ductless mini-split installation
seo.secondaryDescription: Adjacent topics — broader subjects worth occasionally writing about even if they're not core. Up to 30.
seo.secondaryPlaceholder: energy efficiency, building codes, refrigerant phase-out

approval.label: Approval mode
approval.intro: What happens after the AI generates a post? You can change this anytime in brand settings.
approval.manualBody: Every generated post lands in pending_approval. You click Approve before publish.
approval.autoBody: Generated post goes straight to draft. Riskier — recommended after dogfood phase.

shell.trialLeft: Trial · {days, plural, one {# day left} other {# days left}}
shell.selectBrandHint: Pick a brand to start writing, or add one.
